CustomField.formula: DISTANCE( GEOLOCATION( $User.User_Latitude__c , $User.User_Longitute__c ), IF(!ISBLANK(Contact__c), GEOLOCATION( Contact__r.MailingLatitude , Contact__r.MailingLongitude ), GEOLOCATION( Organization__r.BillingLatitude , Organization__r.BillingLongitude)) , 'km')
CustomField.label: Distance Away
